steps.title: Use the diameter formula
steps.content:
Circumference can be written directly in terms of diameter:
$$
C=\pi d
$$
The problem gives $C=28\pi$, so use that form.

steps.title: Solve for the diameter
steps.content: Set the expressions equal and divide by $\pi$: $$ 28\pi=\pi d $$ So $$ d=28 $$ The answer is 28.
